title: Gate Limit Challenge Variants
summary: For every 3-starred level, unlock a 'gate limit' variant with optimal gate count as hard budget. Diamond badge tracking, achievement, stats integration.

items.title: Unlock gate limit variant after 3-starring a level
items.details: Add isGateLimitMode flag to GameState. Add startGateLimitLevel(levelId) that sets the mode and loads the level with gateBudget = level.optimalGates. Gate limit is only available if progress.levels[id].stars === 3.

items.title: Gate limit = optimal gate count enforcement
items.details: When isGateLimitMode is true, set this.gateBudget = level.optimalGates. In runSimulation and runQuickTest, check gates.length > gateBudget and refuse to run with a message if exceeded. Gate budget prevents adding more gates beyond limit.

items.title: Gate limit sub-row in level select
items.details: In renderLevelSelect(), after a completed 3-star level card, add a sub-row button '🏆 Gate Limit Challenge' with diamond badge if completed. Style with gold border. Click starts startGateLimitLevel(id).

items.title: Diamond badge completion tracking
items.details: Add gateLimitCompleted field to progress.levels[id]. In completeGateLimitLevel(), set this field = true and save. Track total gate limit completions across all levels.

items.title: Gate Budget indicator in gameplay
items.details: In updateGateIndicator(), when isGateLimitMode, show 'Budget: X/Y' where Y is gateBudget. Turn red when X > Y. Add visual shake when player tries to exceed budget.

items.title: Efficiency Expert achievement
items.details: Add 'efficiency_expert' achievement (gold tier): 'Complete 10 gate limit challenges'. Track in achievements.stats.gateLimitCompletions. Check after each gate limit completion.

items.title: No hints in gate limit mode
items.details: When isGateLimitMode, hide hint button entirely. No hint tokens spent. Skip hint setup in loadLevel when gate limit mode.

items.title: Optimal comparison after gate limit completion
items.details: After gate limit completion, show 'Perfect efficiency! You matched the optimal X-gate solution.' in the star display area. Show diamond ⬦ badge prominently.

items.title: Hard mode speedrun option
items.details: Add checkbox/toggle in speedrun mode UI for 'Gate Limit Mode' that applies gate budgets to all speedrun levels. Track as separate best time.

items.title: Gate limit stats in dashboard
items.details: In stats dashboard, show 'Gate Limit Challenges: X/Y completed' with progress bar. Show in Logic Profile section.
